title: BEM-869 route after 868
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:15 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem868_execute_bem867_route.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='claude_code_action_smoke_approved':
    status='route_mark_claude_action_proven'
    next_action='record claude-code-action proven and continue BEM-862 operating loop'
elif ps=='claude_code_action_smoke_blocked_by_response':
    status='route_extract_and_repair_blocker'
    next_action='extract non-secret blocker from smoke response and patch'
elif str(ps).startswith('dispatch_result_dispatch_attempted'):
    status='route_wait_verify_smoke_runtime'
    next_action='verify smoke runtime after dispatch_attempted and response file'
elif str(ps).startswith('dispatch_result_token_missing'):
    status='route_fix_dispatch_token_env'
    next_action='patch workflow dispatch queue processor token env or secret name'
elif str(ps).startswith('dispatch_result_dispatch_failed'):
    status='route_patch_dispatch_target'
    next_action='patch workflow name/ref/permission for smoke dispatch'
elif ps=='smoke_runtime_seen_without_response':
    status='route_patch_smoke_response_writer'
    next_action='patch smoke prompt or commit path so response file lands'
else:
    status='route_repair_dispatch_processing'
    next_action='repair dispatch queue processor/result writer or smoke workflow target visibility'
state={'bem':'BEM-869','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem869_route_after_bem868.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem869_route_after_bem868.md').write_text('# BEM-869 | Route After BEM-868 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem869_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Continue Claude Code Action track until result.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-869'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem869_route_after_bem868','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem869_route_after_bem868.txt').write_text('BEM-869 '+status+' previous='+ps+'\n')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem869_route_after_bem868.json','governance/reports/bem869_route_after_bem868.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem869_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/codex/proofs/bem869_route_after_bem868.txt'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-868 Claude Code Action smoke execution status')
